TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Barbados, title = Barbados, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Barbados} }

S.FORM: Papito - Barbados Papito Kitakit Takaray a sowal Itiraay i ksala'ed no Ciyalepi Riyar ato Tasiyang, o kanatalan a kitakit, i sakawaliay no Saka'etipay a Kanatanatal ko ka itiraan nona kitakit. O syoto i,o Kayakayan Niyaro' ,o dadahal nona kanatal a kitakit i,430„éĘ, sahetoay o dasdas a pala, ikemod nona kanatal i,iraay ko pinapina a tapolo. I 13¬ļN,59¬ļW ko kaitiraan. Papito a kitakit i,mahinakeray ko o Finawlan ko Sakakaay sanay a Foco no Sici, itiyaay i 1966 miheca saka 11 folad saka 30 romi'ad a Nisiiked a Mikowan, o mikapotay to Tata'akay Ikiris a Lekatep , Ira ko pilekal no sifo no Papito i 2020 miheca saka 9 folad saka 16 romi'ad , ciharateng to sapipalasawadaw to kalasawara'an ni Ilicapid II , ano macorok kona demak i, ya miliyas to Tata'akay Ikiris a Lekatep i 2021 miheca saka 11 folad a patireng to Kapolongan a Kitakit, nikawrira, mikapot to tayal nona Lelatep. O lihaf nani i Sifo'ay no Citodongay to Spay a Tayal no Amirika(Central Intelligence Agency,decdec a tilid:CIA) ato kakeridan no Citodongay to Ipapotalay a Demak no La'enoay Pikaykian no Ikiris ci Tomas Tokentato(Thomas Tugendhat) a sowal i, o Congko ko misasawiay ta makidkid pasitira i Congko a mipadang a micoroh to sakacemahad no Itay-Iro , palacacoli ko Papito ato Ikiris. Nikawrira,awaay ko maamaan a sapawacay tona sowal. O ngangan no Papito nani sowal no Potokaru(Potawya)"Os Barbados"anoca o sowal no Sipanya"Los Barbados", o imi nonini i,o"the bearded ones"sanay,ma'edefay ko palapalan to fiko a killing(haherher,samoro) sanay. Rikisi Itiya ho i 16 sici iraay to ko Youropa a tamdaw a tayni a misang' to kakowanen a pala, o sarakatay a tamdaw maro'ay itini i,o Arawako ato Kalopi a tamdaw. Nani 1625 miheca tahira i 1966 miheca, o mikowanan no Inkolan ato ikoray a tayni a Ikiris a tamdaw. Nani 1966 miheca tahaikor o Wismisto a rayray ko pido'edo'edoan a patireng to Hontian Rikec ato Nikapolongan Kitakit, o Honti no Ikiris ci Ilicapid II ko sawara'an nona kitakit. I'ayaway a Rikisi Ira ko kapiwacay, i'ayaw ni Yiso to 2000 ko mihecaan, iraay to ko tamdaw a maro' itini ton apala. I 350~650 mihecaan, o nani Katomolay Amirika a tamdaw ko tayniay a maro',latek itira i 800 miheca, o Arawako tamdaw hananay no Sipanya a tamdaw mihinakeray to itini ton apala. Tahira to i sasifo'an no 13 sici o sakatolo a liyad no Kalopi a tamdaw ko tayniay amaro'. Isa'ayaway a Rikisi I 16 sici, cilacila malali'aca to koli ko Hontian a Sipanya ato Papito, orasak, tangso a malowan ko itini tiniay a maro' a Intian a tamdaw. Nani 1600 miheca, o Inkolan tamdaw, Frasu a tamdaw, Olanta(Holan) a tamdaw, misatapang a misakilikilim to maamaan ato mipatireng to sakowan itini. Ano macakacakatay tona kanatal ko Sipanya a tamdaw ato Portokalo(Putawya) i Papito, nikawrira, o sarakatat a ptireng to Sakowan itini i ,o Inkolan a tamdaw i 1627 a miheca. 1640 miheca tahira i saka 18 sici(1640 ŚĻīŤá≥18šłĖÁīÄ) Yo malalood ko ilaloma'ay no Ikiris i,madafdaf a tahira i Papito kona lalood, i 1649miheca saka 1 folad saka30 romi'ad patayen no finawlan ci Cali I honti, ikor to no kapatay ningra ta ta mahaop tona lalood. Aikor to i,pacomoden no Holan(Olanta)ko pipaloma ato misongila' a misang' to tefos, mipacod ho to koli nani Afrika, onini ko saka falic no syakai ato kicai no Papito. Na pisatapangan a mipaloma to tefos i 1640 miheca mala o cecay no sakakaay a mipalomaay to tefos a demak i hekal ko Papito. 18 sici tahira i 20 sici (18šłĖÁīÄŤá≥20 šłĖÁīÄ) Itini i Ikiris i,palasawaden ko kalali'aca to koli i 1807 miheca, 1816 miheca mifodfod ko koli, nano kairaan no rikisi o sakakaay kona fodfod, onini ko sapapipalahedaw no Papito ato mikowanan no Ikiris a roma a kitakit i Sa'etipay Indo a Kanatanatal i 1834 miheca. Tahira to i saka 20 sici, oya teloc no nitedalan to a koli milongoc to sakowan a 'icel. 1938 miheca patireng ci Puliciton to Cemahaday a Lekatep no Papito, toikor falicen a pangangan to Matayalay a Centang no Papito. Aniniay Nani 1958 miheca tahira i 1962 miheca, o cecay no mamo'etepay a Nipatatekoan a kitakit no Sa'etipay Indo a Kanatanatal ko Papito. 1966 miheca saka 6 folad, masasowal ko Papito ato Ikiris to sakasiikedaw a mikowan no Papito. Fangcal a rihaday ko kasasowal ta laheci sato ko Kasiiked no Papito i 1966 miheca saka 11 folad saka 30 romi'ad, o sakacecay a Congli ci Ailor Palo. Kasasilsil no Sakowan Itini ni Papito i,masilsil to 11 a Lekad no Kyokai , o syoto tatapangan a tokai Kayakayan Niyaro' itiraay i Sie-Mayko Lekad no Kyokai. Palapalaan Itini i 13 10 N, 59 32 W, no Notimolan Amilika ko Barbados. Polong no sekalay i 430 sq km "saka 202 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 430 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 0 sq km " Polong i 291,495 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 32.60%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 19.40%, malo no roma to a sera 48%. siyoto O (((Bridgetown)) ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakafalo 1 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Elizabeth II , patirengan a romi'ad i 1952 a miheca saka 2 folad saka 6 a romi'ad. Kicai O aniniay a Kapolongan a Nitayalan a 'Epoc Ilalom' no kitakit(Gross Domestic Product,decdec:GDP) ato Lalen a 'Etan no Kalotamdaw ila'enaay ho ni itiyaay ho i 2007 miheca, o a 'aca a sa'osi macakatay to 36%, o payso no Papito malasafaay to patokeled han i, o awaay to katayalan a tamdaw i, macakat ko ka'aloman, o citayalay han i,cecay a lipay tosa anoca tolo ko katayalan a romi'ad, tada awaay to ko 'epoc no katayal, o sifo han i,ano pacakacakaten ko sata caay ka songila' a masalof ko polong a pili'etan no kitakit. O Hekal a Kiking Lekatep ira ko pali'ayaw a sowal i 2013 miheca ato 2014 miheca o kicai no Papito mamaynas to 0.8% ato 1.1%, onini i, o dengan konini a kitakit ko caay ka cemahad i Sa'etipay a Pecih no Cikiw. Nikawrira, o safa'elohay a pasadakan no Sifo'ay Kinko no Papito,i 2013 miheca mamaynas to 0.7%, cowa ka pasowal to 2014 mihecaan a sa'osi. O pinengneng to ni Talifis i, o tadakalacemcemay amontay no Papito i,macakatmacakat ko kiyam ato kasipon tahiraay to i 2,5 ok no Amirika a payso. I'ayaw nonini to 5 mihecaan, o tatapangan a demak no sifo no Papito o pirowan to pikaloc(pila'om) to payso, masiwar ko micomoday a payso no sifo. Tona mihecahecan cowa ka cemahad ko damak no malali'acaay, matongal ho ko ka'aloman no awaay ko tayal, iraira ko tayal i,caka pina ko widi ko katayaln, mansa caka pakapasata, mafelih ko demak no sifo pacakaten ko sata ta ira to ko micomoday a payso no sifo saan. Ano o pirowan aca to pikaloc(pila'om) to payso ato pacakat to sata ko demak i,cowa ko mamanga'ay ko katayalan, matongalmatongal ko kiyam.

¶ no~u kataja…ĺ, o~u sifo~u ńßan i,ano~u pa ¶aka ¶akat…ôn ko~u sata ¶aaj ka so~uŇči…ĺa ° a masa…ĺo~uf ko~u po~u…ĺo~uŇč a pi…ĺi °…ôtan no~u kitakit. o~u ńß…ôka…ĺ a kikiŇč …ĺ…ôkat…ôp ira ko~u pa…ĺi p…ô ¶ińß no~u ¶ikiw. nikawrira, o~u safa °…ô…ĺo~uńßaj a pasa…¨~…ģakan no~u sifo~u °aj kinko~u no~u papito~u,i **** mińß…ô ¶a mamajnas to~u *.*%, ¶o~uwa ka paso~uwa…ĺ to~u **** mińß…ô ¶aan a sa °o~usi. o~u pin…ôŇčn…ôŇč to~u ni ta…ĺifis i, o~u ta…¨~…ģaka…ĺa ¶…ôm ¶…ômaj amo~untaj no~u papito~u i,ma ¶akatma ¶akat ko~u kijam ato~u kasipo~un tańßiraaj to~u i *,* o~uk no~u amirika a pajso~u. i °ajaw no~unini to~u * mińß…ô ¶aan, o~u tatapaŇčan a …¨~…ģ…ômak no~u sifo~u no~u papito~u o~u piro~uwan to~u pika…ĺo~u ¶(pi…ĺa °o~um) to~u pajso~u, masiwar ko~u mi ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a pajso~u no~u sifo~u. to~una mińß…ô ¶ańß…ô ¶an ¶o~uwa ka ¶…ômańßa…¨~…ģ ko~u …¨~…ģamak no~u ma…ĺa…ĺi °a ¶aaj, mato~uŇča…ĺ ńßo~u ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u awaaj ko~u taja…ĺ, iraira ko~u taja…ĺ i, ¶aka pina ko~u wi…¨~…ģi ko~u kataja…ĺn, mansa ¶aka pakapasata, maf…ô…ĺińß ko~u …¨~…ģ…ômak no~u sifo~u pa ¶akat…ôn ko~u sata ta ira to~u ko~u mi ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a pajso~u no~u sifo~u saan. ano~u o~u piro~uwan a ¶a to~u pika…ĺo~u ¶(pi…ĺa °o~um) to~u pajso~u ato~u pa ¶akat to~u sata ko~u …¨~…ģ…ômak i, ¶o~uwa ko~u mamaŇča °aj ko~u kataja…ĺan, mato~uŇča…ĺmato~uŇča…ĺ ko~u kijam.
S.FORM: Papito - Barbados Papito Kitakit Takaray a sowal Itiraay i ksala'ed no Ciyalepi Riyar ato Tasiyang, o kanatalan a kitakit, i sakawaliay no Saka'etipay a Kanatanatal ko ka itiraan nona kitakit. O syoto i,o Kayakayan Niyaro' ,o dadahal nona kanatal a kitakit i,430„éĘ, sahetoay o dasdas a pala, ikemod nona kanatal i,iraay ko pinapina a tapolo. I 13¬ļN,59¬ļW ko kaitiraan. Papito a kitakit i,mahinakeray ko o Finawlan ko Sakakaay sanay a Foco no Sici, itiyaay i 1966 miheca saka 11 folad saka 30 romi'ad a Nisiiked a Mikowan, o mikapotay to Tata'akay Ikiris a Lekatep , Ira ko pilekal no sifo no Papito i 2020 miheca saka 9 folad saka 16 romi'ad , ciharateng to sapipalasawadaw to kalasawara'an ni Ilicapid II , ano macorok kona demak i, ya miliyas to Tata'akay Ikiris a Lekatep i 2021 miheca saka 11 folad a patireng to Kapolongan a Kitakit, nikawrira, mikapot to tayal nona Lelatep. O lihaf nani i Sifo'ay no Citodongay to Spay a Tayal no Amirika(Central Intelligence Agency,decdec a tilid:CIA) ato kakeridan no Citodongay to Ipapotalay a Demak no La'enoay Pikaykian no Ikiris ci Tomas Tokentato(Thomas Tugendhat) a sowal i, o Congko ko misasawiay ta makidkid pasitira i Congko a mipadang a micoroh to sakacemahad no Itay-Iro , palacacoli ko Papito ato Ikiris. Nikawrira,awaay ko maamaan a sapawacay tona sowal. O ngangan no Papito nani sowal no Potokaru(Potawya)"Os Barbados"anoca o sowal no Sipanya"Los Barbados", o imi nonini i,o"the bearded ones"sanay,ma'edefay ko palapalan to fiko a killing(haherher,samoro) sanay. Rikisi Itiya ho i 16 sici iraay to ko Youropa a tamdaw a tayni a misang' to kakowanen a pala, o sarakatay a tamdaw maro'ay itini i,o Arawako ato Kalopi a tamdaw. Nani 1625 miheca tahira i 1966 miheca, o mikowanan no Inkolan ato ikoray a tayni a Ikiris a tamdaw. Nani 1966 miheca tahaikor o Wismisto a rayray ko pido'edo'edoan a patireng to Hontian Rikec ato Nikapolongan Kitakit, o Honti no Ikiris ci Ilicapid II ko sawara'an nona kitakit. I'ayaway a Rikisi Ira ko kapiwacay, i'ayaw ni Yiso to 2000 ko mihecaan, iraay to ko tamdaw a maro' itini ton apala. I 350~650 mihecaan, o nani Katomolay Amirika a tamdaw ko tayniay a maro',latek itira i 800 miheca, o Arawako tamdaw hananay no Sipanya a tamdaw mihinakeray to itini ton apala. Tahira to i sasifo'an no 13 sici o sakatolo a liyad no Kalopi a tamdaw ko tayniay amaro'. Isa'ayaway a Rikisi I 16 sici, cilacila malali'aca to koli ko Hontian a Sipanya ato Papito, orasak, tangso a malowan ko itini tiniay a maro' a Intian a tamdaw. Nani 1600 miheca, o Inkolan tamdaw, Frasu a tamdaw, Olanta(Holan) a tamdaw, misatapang a misakilikilim to maamaan ato mipatireng to sakowan itini. Ano macakacakatay tona kanatal ko Sipanya a tamdaw ato Portokalo(Putawya) i Papito, nikawrira, o sarakatat a ptireng to Sakowan itini i ,o Inkolan a tamdaw i 1627 a miheca. 1640 miheca tahira i saka 18 sici(1640 ŚĻīŤá≥18šłĖÁīÄ) Yo malalood ko ilaloma'ay no Ikiris i,madafdaf a tahira i Papito kona lalood, i 1649miheca saka 1 folad saka30 romi'ad patayen no finawlan ci Cali I honti, ikor to no kapatay ningra ta ta mahaop tona lalood. Aikor to i,pacomoden no Holan(Olanta)ko pipaloma ato misongila' a misang' to tefos, mipacod ho to koli nani Afrika, onini ko saka falic no syakai ato kicai no Papito. Na pisatapangan a mipaloma to tefos i 1640 miheca mala o cecay no sakakaay a mipalomaay to tefos a demak i hekal ko Papito. 18 sici tahira i 20 sici (18šłĖÁīÄŤá≥20 šłĖÁīÄ) Itini i Ikiris i,palasawaden ko kalali'aca to koli i 1807 miheca, 1816 miheca mifodfod ko koli, nano kairaan no rikisi o sakakaay kona fodfod, onini ko sapapipalahedaw no Papito ato mikowanan no Ikiris a roma a kitakit i Sa'etipay Indo a Kanatanatal i 1834 miheca. Tahira to i saka 20 sici, oya teloc no nitedalan to a koli milongoc to sakowan a 'icel. 1938 miheca patireng ci Puliciton to Cemahaday a Lekatep no Papito, toikor falicen a pangangan to Matayalay a Centang no Papito. Aniniay Nani 1958 miheca tahira i 1962 miheca, o cecay no mamo'etepay a Nipatatekoan a kitakit no Sa'etipay Indo a Kanatanatal ko Papito. 1966 miheca saka 6 folad, masasowal ko Papito ato Ikiris to sakasiikedaw a mikowan no Papito. Fangcal a rihaday ko kasasowal ta laheci sato ko Kasiiked no Papito i 1966 miheca saka 11 folad saka 30 romi'ad, o sakacecay a Congli ci Ailor Palo. Kasasilsil no Sakowan Itini ni Papito i,masilsil to 11 a Lekad no Kyokai , o syoto tatapangan a tokai Kayakayan Niyaro' itiraay i Sie-Mayko Lekad no Kyokai. Palapalaan Itini i 13 10 N, 59 32 W, no Notimolan Amilika ko Barbados. Polong no sekalay i 430 sq km "saka 202 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 430 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 0 sq km " Polong i 291,495 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 32.60%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 19.40%, malo no roma to a sera 48%. siyoto O (((Bridgetown)) ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakafalo 1 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Elizabeth II , patirengan a romi'ad i 1952 a miheca saka 2 folad saka 6 a romi'ad. Kicai O aniniay a Kapolongan a Nitayalan a 'Epoc Ilalom' no kitakit(Gross Domestic Product,decdec:GDP) ato Lalen a 'Etan no Kalotamdaw ila'enaay ho ni itiyaay ho i 2007 miheca, o a 'aca a sa'osi macakatay to 36%, o payso no Papito malasafaay to patokeled han i, o awaay to katayalan a tamdaw i, macakat ko ka'aloman, o citayalay han i,cecay a lipay tosa anoca tolo ko katayalan a romi'ad, tada awaay to ko 'epoc no katayal, o sifo han i,ano pacakacakaten ko sata caay ka songila' a masalof ko polong a pili'etan no kitakit. O Hekal a Kiking Lekatep ira ko pali'ayaw a sowal i 2013 miheca ato 2014 miheca o kicai no Papito mamaynas to 0.8% ato 1.1%, onini i, o dengan konini a kitakit ko caay ka cemahad i Sa'etipay a Pecih no Cikiw. Nikawrira, o safa'elohay a pasadakan no Sifo'ay Kinko no Papito,i 2013 miheca mamaynas to 0.7%, cowa ka pasowal to 2014 mihecaan a sa'osi. O pinengneng to ni Talifis i, o tadakalacemcemay amontay no Papito i,macakatmacakat ko kiyam ato kasipon tahiraay to i 2,5 ok no Amirika a payso. I'ayaw nonini to 5 mihecaan, o tatapangan a demak no sifo no Papito o pirowan to pikaloc(pila'om) to payso, masiwar ko micomoday a payso no sifo. Tona mihecahecan cowa ka cemahad ko damak no malali'acaay, matongal ho ko ka'aloman no awaay ko tayal, iraira ko tayal i,caka pina ko widi ko katayaln, mansa caka pakapasata, mafelih ko demak no sifo pacakaten ko sata ta ira to ko micomoday a payso no sifo saan. Ano o pirowan aca to pikaloc(pila'om) to payso ato pacakat to sata ko demak i,cowa ko mamanga'ay ko katayalan, matongalmatongal ko kiyam.

no~u ka…ĺo~utam…¨~…ģaw i…ĺa °…ônaaj ńßo~u ni itijaaj ńßo~u i **** mińß…ô ¶a, o~u a °a ¶a a sa °o~usi ma ¶akataj to~u **%, o~u pajso~u no~u papito~u ma…ĺasafaaj to~u pato~uk…ô…ĺ…ô…¨~…ģ ńßan i, o~u awaaj to~u kataja…ĺan a tam…¨~…ģaw i, ma ¶akat ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman, o~u ¶itaja…ĺaj ńßan i, ¶…ô ¶aj a …ĺipaj to~usa ano~u ¶a to~u…ĺo~u ko~u kataja…ĺan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, ta…¨~…ģa awaaj to~u ko~u °…ôpo~u ¶ no~u kataja…ĺ, o~u sifo~u ńßan i,ano~u pa ¶aka ¶akat…ôn ko~u sata ¶aaj ka so~uŇči…ĺa ° a masa…ĺo~uf ko~u po~u…ĺo~uŇč a pi…ĺi °…ôtan no~u kitakit. o~u ńß…ôka…ĺ a kikiŇč …ĺ…ôkat…ôp ira ko~u pa…ĺi °ajaw a so~uwa…ĺ i **** mińß…ô ¶a ato~u **** mińß…ô ¶a o~u ki ¶ai no~u papito~u mamajnas to~u *.*% ato~u *.*%, o~unini i, o~u …¨~…ģ…ôŇčan ko~unini a kitakit ko~u ¶aaj ka ¶…ômańßa…¨~…ģ i sa °…ôtipaj a p…ô ¶ińß no~u ¶ikiw. nikawrira, o~u safa °…ô…ĺo~uńßaj a pasa…¨~…ģakan no~u sifo~u °aj kinko~u no~u papito~u,i **** mińß…ô ¶a mamajnas to~u *.*%, ¶o~uwa ka paso~uwa…ĺ to~u **** mińß…ô ¶aan a sa °o~usi. o~u pin…ôŇčn…ôŇč to~u ni ta…ĺifis i, o~u ta…¨~…ģaka…ĺa ¶…ôm ¶…ômaj amo~untaj no~u papito~u i,ma ¶akatma ¶akat ko~u kijam ato~u kasipo~un tańßiraaj to~u i *,* o~uk no~u amirika a pajso~u. i °ajaw no~unini to~u * mińß…ô ¶aan, o~u tatapaŇčan a …¨~…ģ…ômak no~u sifo~u no~u papito~u o~u piro~uwan to~u pika…ĺo~u ¶(pi…ĺa °o~um) to~u pajso~u, masiwar ko~u mi ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a pajso~u no~u sifo~u. to~una mińß…ô ¶ańß…ô ¶an ¶o~uwa ka ¶…ômańßa…¨~…ģ ko~u …¨~…ģamak no~u ma…ĺa…ĺi °a ¶aaj, mato~uŇča…ĺ ńßo~u ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u awaaj ko~u taja…ĺ, iraira ko~u taja…ĺ i, ¶aka pina ko~u wi…¨~…ģi ko~u ¶(pi…ĺa °o~um) to~u pajso~u ato~u pa ¶akat to~u sata ko~u …¨~…ģ…ômak i, ¶o~uwa ko~u mamaŇča °aj ko~u kataja…ĺan, mato~uŇča…ĺmato~uŇča…ĺ ko~u kijam.
